title: De-Fable the harness docs: coordinator role becomes model-agnostic (HUMAN-GATED NLAH mutation, approved by operator 2026-07-05 - Fable access ends 2026-07-07)
description: Reword every NORMATIVE reference to Fable 5 so the harness is explicitly model-agnostic. The mechanical layer already is (zero Fable references in .harness/bin/; bench agents pin opus/sonnet which persist). Owned files: CLAUDE.md, gemini.md, ORCHESTRATION.md, README.md (repo root), docs/harness-explainer.html. Changes: (1) CLAUDE.md - title/HarnessCard/section 5: replace 'Fable 5' as a REQUIRED engine with 'the Coordinator' defined as 'the strongest Claude model available in the main Claude Code session (tested with Fable 5; runs identically on Opus or Sonnet)'; keep the CAR structure, roles, rules intact - this is a rewording, not a redesign. (2) gemini.md - same treatment for its coordinator references. (3) ORCHESTRATION.md section 4 'Coordinator (Fable 5)' -> 'Coordinator (main session, strongest available model)'. (4) README.md root - coordinator mentions likewise. (5) docs/harness-explainer.html - header diagram says 'COORDINADOR (Fable, la sesion principal)' -> 'COORDINADOR (la sesion principal de Claude Code)' plus any other normative Fable mentions; keep historical mentions of what Fable DID (audits, verdicts) since those are records. DO NOT touch: .harness/tasks/*, .harness/logs/*, .harness/plan.md, prompts para Gemini/, state.json, blackboard.json (history and coordinator-owned state stay as-is; the coordinator updates state.json separately). Acceptance: (a) grep -rni fable across the five owned files returns ONLY clearly-historical mentions (e.g. 'tested with Fable 5', explainer footer credit, past-tense records) - zero mentions that imply Fable is REQUIRED to run the harness; (b) no structural/semantic change to roles, gates, limits, protocols (diff review must show rewording only); (c) the four human gates remain verbatim; (d) markdown renders sane (no broken headers), HTML still valid (open-able). Replayable evidence: the exact grep results per file, before/after.

notes.note: plan: grep fable refs in all 5 owned files, reword only requirement-implying mentions to model-agnostic Coordinator language, keep historical mentions verbatim

EXPECTED: rewording-only diff across 5 owned files replacing normative Fable-5-required language with model-agnostic Coordinator language, zero mentions left implying Fable is required to run the harness. ACTUAL: git diff shows symmetric line-for-line replacement in all 5 files (claude.md 7ins/7del, gemini.md 3/3, ORCHESTRATION.md 1/1, README.md 4/4, docs/harness-explainer.html 2/2) - no lines added/removed, no headings/sections restructured. Post-change grep -ni fable per file: claude.md:14 and gemini.md:14 'tested with Fable 5; runs identically on Opus or Sonnet' (historical/parenthetical, non-requiring); README.md:3 same 'tested with Fable 5' parenthetical; docs/harness-explainer.html:422 unchanged footer credit 'Generado por el coordinador Fable' (explicitly permitted historical credit per contract); ORCHESTRATION.md now has ZERO fable mentions (its one normative mention at old line 75 was reworded). HTML re-parsed successfully via python html.parser (27424 chars, no errors) confirming still valid/open-able. state.json human_gates block read back verbatim (4 gates incl. 'mutating claude.md or gemini.md') - untouched, confirming criterion (c). No file outside the 5 owned files, and none of the excluded paths (.harness/tasks/, .harness/logs/, .harness/plan.md, prompts para Gemini/, state.json, blackboard.json) were touched.

HANDOFF -> verifier: De-Fable mutation complete, human-gated by operator approval 2026-07-05. REPLAY: (1) git diff claude.md gemini.md ORCHESTRATION.md README.md docs/harness-explainer.html -- review for rewording-only (no added/removed lines, symmetric ins/del per file). (2) grep -ni fable claude.md gemini.md ORCHESTRATION.md README.md docs/harness-explainer.html -- expect ONLY: claude.md:14 and gemini.md:14 '(tested with Fable 5; runs identically on Opus or Sonnet)' in the Orchestration Coordinator HarnessCard line; README.md:3 same tested-with parenthetical in the intro; docs/harness-explainer.html:422 the unchanged footer credit 'Generado por el coordinador Fable · 2026-07-04'; ORCHESTRATION.md returns ZERO matches (its one Fable mention was fully reworded). (3) python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('docs/harness-explainer.html',encoding='utf-8').read()); print('ok')" -- confirms HTML still parses/opens. (4) python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('.harness/state.json'))['human_gates'])" -- confirms the 4 human gates (incl. 'mutating claude.md or gemini.md') are verbatim/untouched. Key before/after quotes: claude.md L1 'NLAH Specification for Fable 5 (Revised)' -> 'NLAH Specification for the Coordinator (Revised)'; claude.md L14 'Fable 5 (coordinating creation and multi-agent topologies)' -> 'the strongest Claude model available in the main Claude Code session (tested with Fable 5; runs identically on Opus or Sonnet), coordinating creation and multi-agent topologies'; claude.md section-5 heading 'Fable 5 Creator & Evolutionary Guidelines' -> 'Coordinator & Evolutionary Guidelines' (and body 'Fable 5 MUST'/'Fable 5 coordinates' -> 'the Coordinator MUST'/'The Coordinator coordinates'); gemini.md got identical L1/L14 treatment; ORCHESTRATION.md L75 '**Coordinator** (Fable 5):' -> '**Coordinator** (main session, strongest available model):'; README.md L3 'under the Fable 5 Orchestration Framework' -> ', coordinated by the strongest Claude model available in the main session (tested with Fable 5; runs identically on Opus or Sonnet)', README.md L10/L48/L50 'Fable 5' -> 'the Coordinator'; docs/harness-explainer.html L92 diagram 'COORDINADOR (Fable, la sesion principal)' -> 'COORDINADOR (la sesion principal de Claude Code)' (exact wording from task contract), L365 'con Fable 5 la calidad' -> 'con un coordinador de agentes como este la calidad' (present-tense philosophical claim, not a historical record, so reworded), L422 footer credit left verbatim (explicitly historical/credit per contract). No changes to roles, gates, limits, protocols, XML-tag conventions, or section structure/numbering (section 5 kept its position, just renamed from 'Fable 5 Creator & Evolutionary Guidelines' to 'Coordinator & Evolutionary Guidelines'). Excluded paths (.harness/tasks/, .harness/logs/, .harness/plan.md, 'prompts para Gemini/', state.json, blackboard.json) confirmed untouched via git status.

VERIFIED (verifier-b, independent replay): De-Fable NLAH mutation is rewording-only, scope-clean, gate-respected. GREP per file: claude.md:14 & gemini.md:14 & README.md:3 = '(tested with Fable 5; runs identically on Opus or Sonnet)' parenthetical/non-requiring; docs/harness-explainer.html:422 = footer credit 'Generado por el coordinador Fable' (permitted historical credit); ORCHESTRATION.md ZERO. No mention implies Fable is REQUIRED. SEMANTIC-DRIFT HUNT (hunk-by-hunk static read): all 15 edited lines are identity-string swaps ('Fable 5'->'the Coordinator'/'strongest Claude model in the main session' / framework name 'Fable 5 Orchestration Framework'->'Universal Agent Harness Orchestration Framework'); roles (thinker/worker/verifier), personas, tool constraints, parallel-safety rules, 5A loop 4-step mechanics, XML-tag conventions (<thinking>/<debugging>/<transition>), and section numbering 1-5 all byte-identical to context. Markdown headers intact (## 5. Coordinator & Evolutionary Guidelines keeps its slot). claude.md 2B active_role reference PRESERVED (line 34) - gen-3 approval correctly not pre-empted. FOUR HUMAN GATES verbatim in state.json (incl 'mutating claude.md or gemini.md'), state.json untouched. GATE DISCIPLINE: operator approval 2026-07-05 recorded in T-034 title+description; mutation within approved de-Fable scope. MACHINE TRUTH: .harness/bin/ zero Fable refs; 5 bench agents pin models (harness-verifier/orchestration-planner/evolution-analyst=opus, research-librarian/substrate-worker=sonnet), state.json tiers match, none touched. HTML re-parsed via html.parser (27424 chars, no error). Excluded zones (.harness/logs/, plan.md, prompts para Gemini/, state.json) show zero tracked modifications; only owned docs + CLI-bookkeeping blackboard.json changed. All acceptance (a)(b)(c)(d) met.
